subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 22/26] server41tests: test link triggers ADD notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that creating a hard link triggers an ADD notification on the directory's delegation. The test creates a file, then links it to a new name from another session. It checks that the server sends an ADD notification with the correct entry name in response to the link operation.
